metadata.title: JIBB - Japan India Business Bureau
metadata.description: A cross-border innovation and industrial collaboration ecosystem connecting Japan and India through partnerships, trade, manufacturing, and technology.

aboutMenu.whoWeAre: Discover JIBB's mission, impact, and core team

servicesMenu.localizationDesc: Adapting business strategies to local culture

highvalueEcosystem.sub2: (Design, Fabrication, OSAT, ATMP, Materials, and Allied Industries)
highvalueEcosystem.bannerText: <orange>The China+1 Strategy, Atmanirbhar India, & Make in India:</orange> India’s semiconductor market is projected to reach <orangeVal>$100+ Billion by 2030</orangeVal> with <underline>16% CAGR</underline>, whilst the automotive component industry has crossed <orangeVal>$51.5 Bn</orangeVal>.
